name: FinPilot AI
description: FinPilot AI is an intelligent, full-stack personal finance and expense management platform that helps users take control of their finances through AI-powered insights and automation. Built with React, Vite, TypeScript, Express, and Google Gemini, the application enables expense tracking via text, voice, and file uploads, automated expense categorization, budget planning, savings goal tracking, bill reminders, financial health analysis, and interactive dashboards. The platform leverages a modular, agent-inspired architecture with LangGraph integration to deliver personalized recommendations, spending behavior analysis, predictive financial insights, and conversational assistance through a modern, responsive SaaS-style interface designed for an enhanced user experience.
